standards.h_beam: GB/T 11263-2024 - Hot rolled H and cut T section steel (replaces GB/T 11263-2017)
standards.i_beam: GB/T 706-2016 - Hot rolled section steel (I-beams, channels, angles)
standards.channel: GB/T 706-2016 - Hot rolled steel channels (C series)
standards.angle: GB/T 706-2016 - Hot rolled equal and unequal leg angles
standards.shs_rhs_chs: GB/T 6728-2017 - Cold formed hollow sections for structural use
standards.design_code: GB 50017-2017 - Standard for design of steel structures

property_definitions.designation: Section designation according to GB standards
property_definitions.rx: Radius of gyration about X-X axis (major axis)
property_definitions.ry: Radius of gyration about Y-Y axis (minor axis)
property_definitions.ix: Moment of inertia about X-X axis (major axis)
property_definitions.iy: Moment of inertia about Y-Y axis (minor axis)
property_definitions.zex: Elastic section modulus about X-X axis (major axis)
property_definitions.zey: Elastic section modulus about Y-Y axis (minor axis)
property_definitions.zpx: Plastic section modulus about X-X axis (major axis)
property_definitions.zpy: Plastic section modulus about Y-Y axis (minor axis)

section_classification_notes.h_beam_hw: HW - Wide flange H-beam (equal or near-equal depth and width, suitable for columns)
section_classification_notes.h_beam_hm: HM - Medium flange H-beam (intermediate proportions, suitable for beams and columns)
section_classification_notes.h_beam_hn: HN - Narrow flange H-beam (optimized for bending, suitable for beams)
section_classification_notes.i_beam: I-beam (普通工字钢) - Sloped inner flange surfaces, designated by height and type (a, b, c)
section_classification_notes.channel: C-channel (槽钢) - Hot-rolled channel with sloped inner flange surfaces
section_classification_notes.angle_equal: Equal angle (等边角钢) - L-shaped with equal leg lengths
section_classification_notes.angle_unequal: Unequal angle (不等边角钢) - L-shaped with different leg lengths
section_classification_notes.shs: Square hollow section (方钢管) - Cold-formed square tube
section_classification_notes.rhs: Rectangular hollow section (矩形钢管) - Cold-formed rectangular tube
section_classification_notes.chs: Circular hollow section (圆钢管) - Cold-formed circular tube
